description: Return to your basics and play around your style statement with this pair of canvas shoes from basics. A perfect blend of style and comfort, this high ankle sneaker comes with two pairs of laces in contrast colours to help you change your style statement with ease. Upper Canvas upper for easy maintenance and durability High ankle for a snug, comfort Fit and for added support to the lower leg Carbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper foot Long canvas tongue for added comfort and snug fit Additional lace in contrast colour Padded footbed with a fabric lining for cushioning and all-day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for enhanced cushioning and impact protection Reinforced guard to protect the forefoot of the shoe and enhance durability Outsole Vulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and traction Diamond-shaped lugs on the forefoot and heel, with slanting grooves along the periphery and midfoot for superior grip on all terrains Shoe care Make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
